🎁 Bonus & Deduction Entry
🪔 Festival Bonus Calculator
Auto-calculates 8.33% of monthly wage (= 1 month salary). Standard under Payment of Bonus Act.
👥 Bulk Bonus / Deduction
Apply a fixed amount or % to all or selected employees at once.
⭐ Automated Performance Rating
System auto-rates each employee based on 4 criteria. You can override before paying bonus.

📤 Bulk Import Customers
Upload your Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file. Supported columns:
Shop Name · Name · Phone · Address · Opening Balance · Current Balance · Credit Policy · Credit Days
Credit Policy values: ready · weekly · monthly · bill
📂
Tap to select file or drag & drop
.xlsx, .xls or .csv (tab-separated also works)

Outstanding
✅ Review the message above. Tap Send via WhatsApp to open WhatsApp with this message ready to send. You still need to tap Send inside WhatsApp.
📤 Bulk Daily Sale
Upload Excel/CSV with columns: Shop Name, Kg, Rate, Amount, Mode (cash/upi/card/credit).
credit = adds to customer balance | cash/upi/card = retail paid now. Name optional for walk-in retail.
📂
Tap to select file or drag & drop
.xlsx or .csv
🛒 Retail Sale
💵 Retail sale = customer pays now. Select a customer to track their purchase, or leave as "Walk-in" for quick unnamed sales.

Export All Data
Download everything — Employees, Attendance, Payments, Expenses, Stock/Purchase entries, P&L Expenses, Cash Payments — as one JSON file.
⬆️
Import Data from Backup
Upload a previously exported backup file. Choose to add to existing data or replace all data.
📊
Export Full Register to Excel
Export combined attendance + salary register for all employees as an Excel workbook (.xlsx).
🗑️
Factory Reset
Delete ALL data — employees, attendance, payments, expenses, stock, customers. Use this to start completely fresh. Cannot be undone.

📤 Waste Bulk Upload
Upload your existing Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file directly.
Required columns: Date · Kg (or Weight Kg) · Rate
Extra columns like Amount, Cash, GPay, Running Balance are ignored automatically — only Date, Kg and Rate are imported.
Date formats accepted: 1-Feb-2026 · 01-02-2026 · 2026-02-01
📂
Tap to select file
or drag & drop here

📤 Eldho Bulk Upload
Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file with columns: Date, Weight (Kg), Rate, Cash, GPay.
Date format: DD-MM-YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD. Rate defaults to 5 if empty. Amount = Kg × Rate.
📂

📗 Google Sheet Sync
Two-way sync: Stock Entries ↔ Google Sheet
🔗 Step 1 — Connect Your Sheet
Paste your Google Apps Script Web App URL:
📋 How to set up (2 minutes) ▼
1. Open Google Sheets → create a new sheet named HenpecStock
2. In the sheet, go to Extensions → Apps Script
3. Delete any existing code and paste the script below
4. Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App
5. Set "Who has access" to Anyone → click Deploy
6. Copy the Web App URL and paste it above
